action.content:
My brother is trying to install a new toilet in his bathroom. Could you give me details of how-to? You don't need to show all details -- just the first 5 steps for now. Separated them with "***", such as:
Step 1: ......
***
Step 2: ......
***
...

End your whole response with the phrase "Let me know how it works. I can give you next steps when you finish all steps above."
action.label: context

action.content:
Step 1: Turn off the water supply to the toilet by rotating the shut-off valve clockwise until it is tight, then flush the toilet to drain most of the water from the tank and bowl. Use a sponge or towel to soak up any remaining water in the bowl and tank.
***
Step 2: Disconnect the water supply line from the bottom of the toilet tank using an adjustable wrench, and place a bucket underneath to catch any residual water that may drip out.
***
Step 3: Remove the old toilet by unscrewing the nuts from the closet bolts at the base of the toilet. If the bolts are rusted, you may need to use a hacksaw to cut them off. Carefully lift the toilet straight up and set it aside on a drop cloth.
***
Step 4: Scrape away the old wax ring and any remaining putty or sealant from the floor flange using a putty knife. Inspect the flange for damage and ensure it is securely attached to the floor; repair or replace it if necessary.
***
Step 5: Install a new wax ring (or wax-free gasket) onto the floor flange, ensuring it is centered and seated properly. This creates the watertight seal between the toilet and the drain pipe.
***
Let me know how it works. I can give you next steps when you finish all steps above.
action.label: response

startend:end_checker.end_phrase: Let me know how it works. I can give you next steps when you finish all steps above.
